absorbed_claims: completed transient plans/specs/notes require product-absorption review before repo retirement

repo retirement requires machine-readable evidence with pass_can_retire, source_hash, source-copy readback, owner paths, absorbed claims, negative claims, empty active followups, and exact-referrer state
repo-only docs lifecycle audit fails completed transient originals without a private vault dependency
staged lifecycle-managed Markdown deletions require matching retirement evidence and a clean exact-referrer state
retirement evidence packets are gate artifacts and are not counted as live exact referrers
